prompt: Give me a comprehensive VoiceOver manual testing protocol — what should I check and in what order?

assertions.text: Includes linear navigation test (swipe right through entire screen)
assertions.rationale: Skill's 10-step VoiceOver protocol starts with linear navigation
Skill verifies section structure via rotor headings

assertions.text: Mentions Screen Curtain test (triple three-finger tap) as gold standard
assertions.rationale: Skill calls Screen Curtain 'the gold standard VoiceOver test'; WITHOUT rarely mentions it

assertions.text: Tests modal focus trapping (escape gesture dismisses)
assertions.rationale: Skill's protocol step: verify focus trapped and escape works
